# Fixture-local Python dependencies for the Gemini identity preservation probe
# and (in later PRs) the Gemini second-runtime fixture.
#
# Maintainer-curation only. The probe and fixture execute outside delegated CI
# during recording; delegated acceptance replays the checked-in cassette and
# does not require these packages to be installed in the workflow if the
# wrapper script handles its own venv.
#
# Pin discipline:
#   - exact version pins for all direct deps to keep cassette compatibility
#     stable across maintainer machines
#   - --require-hashes is intentionally omitted in this first scaffolding PR
#     because the implementation PR will choose a final lockfile format
#     (pip+requirements.txt --hash, uv.lock, or poetry.lock) per #1307. This
#     file is a minimum-viable pinned baseline for the identity probe; it is
#     not the final delegated-acceptance lockfile.

google-genai==2.6.0
vcrpy==8.0.0
